(Amended) Notice Of Motoon And Motion To Compel Further Responses And Documents To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Documents Set One To Defts Bana, Bai, Bac, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Natalie bradhsaw's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents (set #1) is granted in part and denied in part.
1-
The objections, other than based on the attorney client or attorney work product privileges are overruled and stricken. The answer is otherwise sufficient.
2, 4-9, 12-16, 18-19, 24, 28-35, 37-39
The objections, other than based on the attorney client or attorney work product privileges are overruled and stricken. If all responsive documents have been produced, that representation shall be verified. Defendants may redact third party and account information by using the first name and first initial of the person's last name and the last 5 digits of the account number. Where applicable account balances should be provided.
3
Denied. The request is overbroad.
10, 36
Denied. The request is overbroad and duplicative of other requests.
11, 17, 20-23, 25-27, 40-41
Denied without prejudice. The requests are overbroad. The parties are ordered to meet and confer to limit the scope of the request to a relevant time period and to mutually agreeable search terms. The parties are ordered to confer within the next 10 days.
Any documents withheld based on a claim of privilege log shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log. Production of documents and a privilege log, if any, shall be completed by March 12, 2007. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
